```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Write API endpoint tests with request/response validation"
---
# API Tests
## Task
Write comprehensive API endpoint tests.
## Requirements
1. Test all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH).
2. Verify response status codes, headers, and body schemas.
3. Test authentication and authorization.
4. Test error responses (400, 401, 403, 404, 500).
5. Test content negotiation and serialization.
## Constraints
- Use test client, not real HTTP calls. Validate response schemas automatically.
## Success Criteria
- All endpoints tested for happy and error paths. Schemas validated. Auth verified.
```
